% cv-skills.tex (tagged) — per-group heading + per-item proficiency bars,
% then \cvskillbubbles. Generated by stklug84/actions cv/parse — do not edit
% by hand.
%
% For each skill group we emit a \cvskillgroupheading{group} followed by one
% \cvskillitembar{name}{size} per item: the item name with an inline
% proficiency bar whose fill is the item's `size` (a 0..1 fraction). The
% optional `concepts` section is rendered last as a \cvskillbubbles row, each
% bubble weighted by its `size`.
%
% \cvskillbubbles uses `;` (label/weight) and `,` (pair separator) as
% structural delimiters, so a bubble LABEL must contain neither; we sanitise
% those two characters to spaces. Slashes are fine and kept verbatim
% (e.g. "Parallel/Scientific Computing").
\cvskillgroupheading{Cloud}
\cvskillitembar{Azure}{0.9}
\cvskillitembar{Landing Zones}{0.7}
\cvskillitembar{Networking}{0.6}
\cvskillitembar{Identity}{0.5}
\cvskillgroupheading{IaC \& Delivery}
\cvskillitembar{Bicep}{0.8}
\cvskillitembar{Terraform}{0.7}
\cvskillitembar{GitHub Actions}{0.6}
\cvskillbubbles{MLOps;8, Knowledge Graphs;6}
